title: Live Forever
why_this_song: Live Forever by Oasis (1994) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Maybe I don't really want to know"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Maybe I don't really want to know"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I want to live I don't want to die"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You and I are gonna live forever"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Maybe I don't really want to know"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "maybe" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Maybe I don't really want to know
Maybe you're the same as me

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Live Forever" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Live Forever"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Oasis one question about "Live Forever", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Oasis sobre "Live Forever", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Live Forever" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Live Forever" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
